member.name: M:api_node_reservas.Controllers.Mapeamentos_OneNoteController.GetById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets one OneNote mapping configuration by id.

member.summary: Gets one OneNote mapping configuration by table name.

member.summary: Gets one Reservas mapping configuration by id.

member.name: M:api_node_reservas.Controllers.Mapeamentos_ReservasController.GetByTableName(System.String)
member.summary: Gets one Reservas mapping configuration by table name.

member.name: M:api_node_reservas.Controllers.Mapeamentos_ReservasController.Create(api_node_reservas.Dtos.MappingConfigurationDto)
member.summary: Creates a new Reservas mapping configuration.

member.name: M:api_node_reservas.Controllers.Processamento_OneNoteController.GetLoginUrl
member.summary: Creates the Microsoft login URL used to request OneNote access.

member.name: M:api_node_reservas.Controllers.Processamento_OneNoteController.LoginCallback(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Receives the Microsoft login result and stores the OneNote access token temporarily.

member.name: M:api_node_reservas.Controllers.Processamento_OneNoteController.GetTokenStatus
member.summary: Checks whether the API has a temporary OneNote access token.

member.name: M:api_node_reservas.Controllers.Processamento_OneNoteController.ExchangeCodeForToken(api_node_reservas.Dtos.OneNoteImportRequestDto)
member.summary: Exchanges a Microsoft authorization code for an access token.

member.name: M:api_node_reservas.Controllers.Processamento_OneNoteController.Import(api_node_reservas.Dtos.OneNoteImportRequestDto)
member.summary: Imports OneNote pages into the OneNote staging table.

member.name: M:api_node_reservas.Controllers.Processamento_OneNoteController.Process(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Processes imported OneNote pages into the knowledge database by mapping id.

member.name: M:api_node_reservas.Controllers.Processamento_OneNoteController.ProcessByTableName(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Processes imported OneNote pages into the knowledge database by table name.

member.name: M:api_node_reservas.Controllers.Processamento_ReservasController.Process(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Processes new or updated Reservas records into the knowledge database.

member.summary: Processes new or updated Reservas records into the knowledge database by table name.
